scripts.setup-vendor: bash ../setup-vendor.sh && source ../../.env && mkdir -p vendor && ln -sfn "$MACROFORGE_TS_CRATE" vendor/macroforge_ts && ln -sfn "$MACROFORGE_TS_MACROS_CRATE" vendor/macroforge_ts_macros && ln -sfn "$MACROFORGE_TS_QUOTE_CRATE" vendor/macroforge_ts_quote && ln -sfn "$MACROFORGE_TS_SYN_CRATE" vendor/macroforge_ts_syn
scripts.build:native: deno install --node-modules-dir && deno run -A npm:@napi-rs/cli/napi build --platform --release --package playground-macros --no-default-features
scripts.build:wasm: deno install --node-modules-dir && cargo build --release --target wasm32-unknown-unknown && deno run -A ../../../tooling/scripts/bench.mjs --wasm-bindgen target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/playground_macros.wasm pkg
scripts.prepare: deno task setup-vendor && deno task build
scripts.clean: rm -f *.node || true; rm -rf target pkg node_modules
scripts.cleanbuild: deno task clean && deno install --node-modules-dir && deno task build
